brief.ai_version:
{
  "video_goal": "Educate viewers on the efficient and effective method of cleaning a refrigerator using a general-purpose cleaning solution.",
  "target_audience": "Homeowners or renters looking for quick and effective refrigerator cleaning methods. They value non-toxic and environmentally friendly cleaning solutions.",
  "company_or_brand_name": "General-purpose cleaning solution",
  "tone_and_style": "professional",
  "format_or_platform": "general",
  "desired_length": "60",
  "show_face": "No",
  "cta": "Try this cleaning method today for a fresher, cleaner fridge.",
  "video_type": "How-to Video",
  "user_inputs": "How to clean your fridge + How-to Video",
  "key_points": [
    "Non-toxic ingredients ensure safety around food and family",
    "Ease of use with simple spray and wipe method",
    "Effectively removes odors and stains, leaving the fridge fresh"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Do not claim: Specific company and product details",
    "Do not claim: Exact product features and benefits"
  ],
  "problem": "Traditional refrigerator cleaning is time-consuming and involves multiple steps, including removing all items, turning off the appliance, and using detergent. This often leads to inefficient cleaning and persistent odors.",
  "core_interaction_steps": [
    "Step 1: Remove all items from the refrigerator.",
    "Step 2: Spray the cleaning solution on all surfaces, including shelves and drawers.",
    "Step 3: Wipe down the surfaces with a clean cloth to remove grime and odors.",
    "Step 4: Place items back in the refrigerator."
  ],
  "common_pitfalls": null,
  "auto_filled_fields": [
    "video_goal",
    "target_audience",
    "company_or_brand_name",
    "cta",
    "key_points",
    "constraints",
    "problem",
    "core_interaction_steps"
  ],
  "unresolved_questions": []
}
